Senior Frontend Developer — Example Corp (Warsaw / hybrid)

We are looking for an experienced frontend engineer to join our product team. You will work on a large Angular application used by enterprise clients.

Requirements:
- 5+ years with Angular (we are on Angular 17; migration to 18 planned)
- Strong TypeScript, RxJS, and state management (NgRx or similar)
- Experience with AG Grid or similar data grids
- Jest or Jasmine for unit tests; E2E with Cypress is a plus
- Comfortable with REST APIs, code review, and CI (Jenkins or GitHub Actions)
- English B2+ for daily communication

Nice to have: Nx monorepo, Signals, experience in fintech or regulated domains.

We offer: competitive salary, flexible hours, private medical care.

Apply with CV and a short note on why this role fits you.
